title: Axe Essentials
description: This texture pack, Axe PvP Essentials, will help you climb the ranks in Axe PvP!
body:
An **Axe** TexturePack to be better in Axe! Here you have what it changes:

* Bow & Crossbow charging indicator
* Low Shield

I made this to enhance your skills in Axe, giving you the offhand in battles with **clearer visuals** and **better timing cues**. Download and improve in axe!
